svg.text: Each dot is one VUS. Count nearby generated variants in a coding window centered on that VUS.
Right = more class 1/2 neighbors. Up = more class 4/5 neighbors. Numbers on axes are counts, not genomic positions.
Number of class 1/2 variants within +/-50 bp around this VUS
Number of class 4/5 variants within +/-50 bp around this VUS
